issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response:
I understand that you've lost access to your Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed your seat. 

To restore your access, please go to **[Organization settings > Organization](https://claude.ai/admin-settings/organization)** and find the member you want to unassign. Click the dropdown under **Seat Type** and select "Unassigned." Then, repeat the process and select “Enterprise seat” to reassign your seat.

If you need further assistance or have any questions about this process, please don't hesitate to reach out to our Support team for help.
justification: The retrieved context contains the exact answer.

I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances 
that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time.
I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could 
provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment.
Thank you for your understanding and support.
response:
We have received your request to reschedule your HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances.

To reschedule an interview, log in to your HackerRank for Work account using your credentials. Go to the Interviews > Interview List and click on the interview you want to reschedule. The Interview Details panel will appear, and then click Invite Candidates again. Select the candidate(s) you want to accommodate time and follow the steps provided in this support article: https://support.hackerrank.com/articles/4811403281-adding-extra-time-for-candidates.

We'll be happy to assist you further once we receive confirmation that the rescheduling process is complete.

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: To delete a candidate's profile in bulk, you need to raise a request to support@hackerrank.com. You'll need to log in to the HackerRank platform in order to Submit a Request to our support team. Alternatively, if you have a Customer Success Manager or Account Manager assigned to you, you may route the request through them. Once your request and the list of candidates to be deleted are received, HackerRank will anonymize the data within 14 days. You will be notified once the deletion is complete.
